name: Enchiladas Rojas
tagline: Chicken enchiladas drowned in dried-chili red sauce, cheese, baked

hero.alt: Enchiladas rojas with bubbling cheese and crema
hero.caption: enchiladas rojas — drowned in chili

steps.title: Toast and soak chilies
steps.detail: Stem and seed chilies. Toast in a dry pan 30 sec per side. Soak in hot water 15 min until pliable.
steps.tip: Chilies that look leathery soak; chilies that crumble were burnt.

steps.title: Blend the sauce
steps.detail: Drain chilies. Blend with onion, garlic, cumin, oregano, salt, and 1 cup hot stock until very smooth.
steps.tip: Strain through a sieve for restaurant-smooth — chili skins can be stringy.

steps.title: Cook sauce, fill tortillas
steps.detail: Pour sauce into a pan over medium 8 min until darkened and oil separates. Dip each tortilla in warm sauce, fill with chicken, roll, place in baking dish.
steps.tip: Warming the tortillas in the sauce keeps them flexible — cold ones tear.

steps.title: Pour, top, bake
steps.detail: Pour remaining sauce over the rolls. Crumble queso on top. Bake 375°F for 18 min until bubbling. Top with crema and onion.
steps.tip: Don't over-bake — tortillas turn to mush past 20 min.

healthFacts: Dried guajillo and ancho chilies are mild — color and depth, not heat.
Toasting chilies before soaking deepens their fruit-and-tobacco notes.
